description_long: This is a large rectangular cardboard parcel, sealed with a single strip of white packing tape running lengthwise across the top. The box is made from corrugated cardboard, showing subtle creases, dents, and some wear, indicating it has been handled or transported. On one of the long sides, there are black printed shipping and handling symbols, including arrows indicating upright orientation, a fragile symbol, a recycling logo, and an umbrella for water protection. A small barcode label is visible on one end, suggesting it is ready for shipping or delivery. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible staple or seam marks along the edges. The overall color is a light brown typical of standard shipping boxes, with minor variations due to lighting and wear.
description: A large, light brown cardboard shipping box with white tape, shipping symbols, and a barcode label. The surface is matte, slightly rough, and shows signs of handling.
description_view_0: The top of the box is visible, dominated by a single strip of white tape running down the center, with a small barcode label in the far corner.
description_view_1: This side view shows the main shipping and handling symbols, staple marks along the edges, and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this end of the box features the white tape and a barcode label, but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, displaying the same shipping and handling symbols and staple marks.
